capabilities.description: Validate an LLM tool call against a JSON Schema. Auto-fixes type mismatches (string '42' → number 42). Algorithmic.

capabilities.name: Employer Review Summary
capabilities.description: Get employer review summary from Glassdoor. Returns overall rating, culture/compensation scores, pros/cons themes.

capabilities.name: Resume Parse
capabilities.description: Extract structured data from a CV/resume. Accepts PDF URL, base64, or text. Returns name, contact, experience, education, skills, certifications.

capabilities.name: Brazilian Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Brazilian company data from ReceitaWS. Requires CNPJ (14 digits). Returns company name, trade name, status, address, activity codes, partners.

capabilities.name: Credit Score Band
capabilities.description: Convert and interpret credit scores between different scoring systems. Maps FICO, VantageScore, Experian, Equifax scores to universal risk bands with percentile estimates.

system.description: Scoring system: fico, vantagescore, experian, equifax (default: fico)

capabilities.name: LEI Lookup
capabilities.description: Look up a Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) via the GLEIF database. Accepts a 20-character LEI or company name. Returns entity name, jurisdiction, addresses, registration status.

capabilities.name: Return Policy Extract
capabilities.description: Extract return/refund policy from a retailer website. Returns window, conditions, exclusions, process steps.

capabilities.name: Product Reviews Extract
capabilities.description: Extract product reviews from Amazon, Trustpilot, or any review page. Returns rating distribution, pros/cons, sentiment.

capabilities.name: Country Tax Rates
capabilities.description: Get corporate tax, VAT, personal income tax, capital gains, and social security rates for 45+ countries.

capabilities.name: API Health Check
capabilities.description: Test an API endpoint: send request, validate response status and schema. Integration testing as a service.

capabilities.name: Phone Validate
capabilities.description: Validate a phone number and classify its type. Returns E.164 format, country, carrier name, and whether it is mobile, landline, or VOIP. Covers 200+ countries.

capabilities.name: URL to Markdown
capabilities.description: Render any URL via headless browser and convert to clean markdown. Strips nav, ads, footers. Works on JS-heavy sites.

capabilities.name: Belgian Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Belgian company data from KBO/BCE (Crossroads Bank for Enterprises). Accepts enterprise number (10 digits, e.g. 0404.616.494) or fuzzy company name.

enterprise_number.description: KBO/BCE enterprise number (e.g. 0404.616.494) or company name

capabilities.name: JSON to CSV
capabilities.description: Convert a JSON array of objects to CSV format. Supports custom delimiters. Pure algorithmic — instant and cheap.

capabilities.name: Sanctions Check
capabilities.description: Check if a person or entity is on sanctions lists (EU, US OFAC, UN, UK). Uses OpenSanctions consolidated database. Returns match results with confidence scores.

name.description: Person or company name to check

capabilities.name: Accessibility Audit
capabilities.description: WCAG 2.1 accessibility audit of a URL. Checks color contrast, alt text, form labels, ARIA roles, heading hierarchy, link text, language. Mostly deterministic.

capabilities.name: Estonian Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Estonian company data from the e-Business Register. Accepts registry code (8 digits) or fuzzy company name.

registry_code.description: Estonian registry code (8 digits) or company name

capabilities.name: Business Day Check
capabilities.description: Check if a specific date is a business day in a given country. Accounts for weekends and public holidays. Also returns the next business day if the given date is not one.

capabilities.name: Receipt Categorize
capabilities.description: Extract and categorize receipt data. Returns vendor, date, amount, tax, currency, expense category, line items. Ready for expense reports.

capabilities.name: Company Name Match
capabilities.description: Fuzzy match and normalize company names. Compares two names accounting for Ltd/Limited, AB/Aktiebolag, Inc/Incorporated, GmbH, etc. Returns match confidence using Levenshtein, Jaro-Winkler, and token overlap algorithms.

capabilities.name: EU Trademark Search
capabilities.description: Search the EUIPO trademark database for registered and pending EU trademarks. Returns trademark names, numbers, status, owners.

capabilities.name: MX Lookup
capabilities.description: DNS lookup for MX, A, AAAA, NS, TXT, SOA records. Detects email provider (Google, Microsoft, etc.), SPF, and DMARC records.

capabilities.name: SSL Certificate Check
capabilities.description: Check a domain's SSL/TLS certificate. Returns issuer, validity dates, days until expiry, protocol version, cipher, and SAN entries.

capabilities.name: Finnish Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Finnish company data from PRH (Patent and Registration Office). Accepts Business ID (e.g. 0112038-9) or fuzzy company name.

business_id.description: Finnish Business ID (e.g. 0112038-9) or company name

capabilities.name: Swiss Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Swiss company data from the Zefix PublicREST API (Federal Office of Justice). Accepts UID (e.g. CHE-105.805.977), EHRAID, or fuzzy company name.

uid.description: Swiss UID (e.g. CHE-105.805.977) or company name

capabilities.name: Base64 Encode URL
capabilities.description: Fetch a URL and return content as base64. Useful for embedding images, PDFs in API calls. Returns base64, content type, data URI.

capabilities.name: Weather Lookup
capabilities.description: Get current weather and 7-day forecast for any location. Uses Open-Meteo API. Search by city name or coordinates.

capabilities.name: Image Resize
capabilities.description: Resize, crop, and convert images. Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP. Configurable dimensions, quality, fit mode. Uses Sharp.

capabilities.name: Docker Hub Info
capabilities.description: Fetch Docker Hub image metadata: pull count, star count, tags, architectures, last updated. Supports official and user images.

capabilities.name: Austrian Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Austrian company data from the Firmenbuch. Accepts Firmenbuchnummer (e.g. FN 150913f) or fuzzy company name.

capabilities.name: Australian Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Australian company data from ABN Lookup. Accepts ABN (11 digits), ACN (9 digits), or fuzzy company name.

abn.description: ABN (11 digits), ACN (9 digits), or company name

capabilities.name: Log Parse
capabilities.description: Parse log files — auto-detects format (JSON, syslog, ISO, logfmt, Laravel). Extracts timestamps, levels, messages. Returns error/warning summary. Algorithmic.

capabilities.name: Phone Normalize
capabilities.description: Parse and normalize phone numbers to E.164 format. Detects country, carrier type, validates format. Uses libphonenumber.

capabilities.name: Employment Cost Estimate
capabilities.description: Calculate total employer cost and net salary estimate for 20+ countries. Includes social contributions, pension, income tax.

capabilities.name: npm Package Info
capabilities.description: Fetch npm package metadata: version, dependencies, downloads, repository, license. Includes weekly download count.

capabilities.name: EU Procurement Tender Search
capabilities.description: Search EU public procurement tenders on TED (Tenders Electronic Daily). Filter by keyword, country, and CPV code. Returns tender titles, authorities, values, deadlines, and links.

country.description: ISO country code filter (e.g. SE, DE)

capabilities.name: SERP Analyze
capabilities.description: Analyze Google search results for a keyword. Returns organic results, featured snippet, People Also Ask, SERP features.

capabilities.name: ID Number Validate
capabilities.description: Validate national identification number formats. Supports Swedish personnummer, Finnish henkilötunnus, Norwegian fødselsnummer, Danish CPR, UK National Insurance, US SSN format, and German Steuer-ID. Checks format and checksum where applicable. Does NOT verify identity.

country_code.description: ISO 2-letter country code (SE, FI, NO, DK, GB, US, DE)

capabilities.name: Latvian Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Latvian company data from the Enterprise Register (Uzņēmumu reģistrs). Accepts registration number (11 digits) or fuzzy company name.

reg_number.description: Latvian registration number (11 digits) or company name

capabilities.name: SWIFT Message Parse
capabilities.description: Parse SWIFT MT messages (MT103/MT940/MT202) into structured data. Extracts sender/receiver BIC, amount, currency, beneficiary.

capabilities.name: IP Risk Score
capabilities.description: Assess fraud risk for an IP address. Detects VPNs, proxies, Tor exit nodes, hosting/datacenter IPs. Returns risk score and risk factors.

capabilities.name: Markdown to HTML
capabilities.description: Convert markdown to styled HTML with inline CSS. Supports light, dark, and plain themes. Algorithmic — instant.

capabilities.name: XML to JSON
capabilities.description: Parse XML string to JSON. Preserves attributes (as @attr), handles CDATA, auto-types values. Algorithmic.

capabilities.name: Address Validate
capabilities.description: Validate and standardize a postal address. Returns structured components, validity confidence, and suggested corrections. Works for 200+ countries via OpenStreetMap Nominatim.

capabilities.name: UK Companies House Officers
capabilities.description: Look up officers (directors, secretaries) of a UK company via Companies House API. Returns active and resigned officers with appointment dates.

capabilities.name: UK Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up UK company data from Companies House. Accepts company number (8 digits) or fuzzy company name. Returns company name, status, incorporation date, SIC codes, registered address.

company_number.description: UK Companies House number (8 digits) or company name

capabilities.name: OG Image Check
capabilities.description: Validate Open Graph and Twitter Card images for a URL. Checks dimensions, file size, format, alt text.

capabilities.name: Robots.txt Parse
capabilities.description: Fetch and parse a website's robots.txt. Returns rules per user-agent, sitemaps, crawl delays, and whether all crawlers are blocked.

capabilities.name: Patent Search
capabilities.description: Search US patents via PatentsView API. Search by keyword, title, or patent number. Returns patent details, inventors, assignees.

capabilities.name: Product Search
capabilities.description: Search products on Google Shopping. Returns product listings with title, price, merchant, rating.

capabilities.name: German Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up German company data from the Handelsregister. Accepts HRB/HRA number or fuzzy company name.

hrb_number.description: Handelsregister number (e.g. HRB 86891) or company name

capabilities.name: URL to Text
capabilities.description: Lightweight text extraction from URL. No JS rendering — just HTTP GET + HTML parse. Fast and cheap for most content sites.

capabilities.name: Agent Trace Analyze
capabilities.description: Analyze AI agent execution traces (LangChain/CrewAI/AutoGen). Identifies failure points, root causes, token waste, and suggests fixes.

capabilities.name: Portuguese Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Portuguese company data from RNPC. Accepts NIPC (9 digits) or fuzzy company name.

nipc.description: NIPC number (9 digits) or company name

capabilities.name: Website Carbon Estimate
capabilities.description: Estimate CO2 emissions per page view using the Website Carbon methodology. Returns rating A-F, annual estimate.

capabilities.name: Beneficial Ownership Lookup
capabilities.description: Look up beneficial ownership (UBO) information for a company. Returns individuals who ultimately own or control the entity, their ownership percentage, and the ownership chain. Uses OpenOwnership and Companies House for UK companies.

capabilities.name: Phone Type Detect
capabilities.description: Detect whether a phone number is mobile, landline, VOIP, toll-free, or premium rate. Essential for SMS delivery verification and communication routing.

capabilities.name: Deduplicate
capabilities.description: Deduplicate a JSON array of objects using fuzzy string matching (Levenshtein + token sort). Specify match fields and threshold.

capabilities.name: Changelog Generate
capabilities.description: Generate a user-facing changelog from git commits. Groups by type, writes human-readable descriptions. Supports Keep a Changelog, semantic, and bullet formats.

capabilities.name: URL Health Check
capabilities.description: Check if a URL is alive. Returns status code, response time, redirect chain, SSL validity, content type, server header.

capabilities.name: Prompt Optimize
capabilities.description: Analyze and improve a prompt. Returns improved version with changes and reasoning, clarity score comparison, and techniques applied.

capabilities.name: Paid API Pre-flight Check
capabilities.description: Verify any paid API endpoint before your agent spends money. Checks reachability, SSL, response time, and validates the payment protocol handshake (L402, x402, MPP). Returns a proceed/caution/avoid recommendation with parsed payment details.

url.description: The paid API endpoint URL to check before paying

capabilities.name: Currency Convert
capabilities.description: Convert an amount between currencies using ECB exchange rates. Supports all major currencies. Returns converted amount and rate.

capabilities.name: Exchange Rate
capabilities.description: Get current exchange rate between two currencies using ECB data. Supports all major currencies. Returns rate, inverse rate, and date.

capabilities.name: Japanese Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Japanese company data from the National Tax Agency corporate number system. Accepts 13-digit corporate number or fuzzy company name.

capabilities.name: Crontab Generate
capabilities.description: Convert natural language schedule to cron expression, or explain an existing cron expression. Returns next run times.

description.description: Schedule in natural language or cron expression

capabilities.name: Secret Scan
capabilities.description: Scan code/config/logs for leaked secrets: AWS keys, GitHub tokens, Stripe keys, API keys, private keys, DB URLs, JWTs. Algorithmic regex matching.

capabilities.name: GDPR Website Check
capabilities.description: Scan a website for GDPR compliance indicators: cookie consent, privacy policy, tracking scripts, security headers. Returns score A-F.

capabilities.name: Container Track
capabilities.description: Track shipping containers by ISO 6346 number. Validates format, detects carrier, provides tracking status.

capabilities.name: Date Parse
capabilities.description: Parse ambiguous date strings into ISO 8601. Handles '3/4/25', 'March 4th', '4. mars 2025', '2025-W14'. Detects ambiguity.

preferred_format.description: DMY, MDY, or YMD (for ambiguous dates)

capabilities.name: Fake Data Generate
capabilities.description: Generate realistic fake data matching a schema. Locale-aware: Swedish names for 'sv', Japanese for 'ja'. Up to 1000 records.

capabilities.name: PR Description Generate
capabilities.description: Generate pull request descriptions from diffs or commit logs. Returns title, summary, changes list, testing steps.

capabilities.name: Customs Duty Lookup
capabilities.description: Look up EU customs duty rates by HS code and origin country. Returns duty rate, preferential rates, anti-dumping status.

capabilities.name: Stock Quote
capabilities.description: Get real-time stock quote data for any publicly traded company. Accepts ticker symbols (e.g. AAPL, VOLV-B.ST). Returns price, change, volume, market state.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, VOLV-B.ST)

capabilities.name: EORI Validation
capabilities.description: Validate an EORI (Economic Operators Registration and Identification) number against the EU customs validation service. Returns trader name and address if valid.

capabilities.name: PyPI Package Info
capabilities.description: Fetch Python package metadata from PyPI: version, dependencies, Python compatibility, release history, license.

capabilities.name: Company ID Detection
capabilities.description: Identify the type and country of a company registration number. Detects Swedish org numbers, Finnish business IDs, German HRB numbers, LEIs, DUNS, and 20+ other formats. Pure algorithmic.

capabilities.name: Contract Extract
capabilities.description: Extract key terms from a contract/legal document. Returns parties, dates, obligations, payment terms, liability caps, termination clauses. Not legal advice.

capabilities.name: LLM Cost Calculate
capabilities.description: Calculate LLM API cost for a prompt+completion across 14 models. Returns cheaper alternatives with savings percentages. Algorithmic.

capabilities.name: HS Code Lookup
capabilities.description: Classify a product into Harmonized System (HS) commodity codes. Returns primary HS code, chapter, section, and alternative classifications with confidence levels.

capabilities.name: Barcode Lookup
capabilities.description: Look up product information by UPC/EAN barcode. Uses Open Food Facts and UPC ItemDB. Returns product name, brand, nutrition, images.

capabilities.name: Backlink Check
capabilities.description: Check backlinks for a domain via CommonCrawl and Google search. Returns linking domains, anchor text, dofollow/nofollow counts.

capabilities.name: Error Explain
capabilities.description: Explain an error message or stack trace in plain English. Identifies root cause, suggests fixes with code examples.

capabilities.name: Norwegian Company Data
capabilities.description: Look up Norwegian company data from the Brønnøysund Register Centre. Accepts org number (9 digits) or fuzzy company name.

org_number.description: Norwegian org number (9 digits) or company name

capabilities.name: Marketplace Fee Calculate
capabilities.description: Calculate seller fees for Amazon, eBay, Etsy, Shopify. Returns total fees, net revenue, fee breakdown.

capabilities.name: GitHub Actions Generate
capabilities.description: Generate CI/CD workflow YAML for GitHub Actions. Supports multiple languages, frameworks, and deploy targets (Railway, Vercel, Fly).

capabilities.name: EU VAT Validation + VIES Enrichment
capabilities.description: Validate a European VAT number against the VIES database and return enriched company data. Handles VIES downtime and rate limiting reliably.

vat_number.description: EU VAT number including country prefix (e.g. SE556703748501)

capabilities.name: Public Holiday Lookup
capabilities.description: Get public holidays for any country and year. Uses Nager.Date API. Returns holiday dates, names, and next upcoming.

capabilities.name: Invoice / Receipt Extraction
capabilities.description: Extract structured data from an invoice or receipt image/PDF. Returns line items, totals, dates, vendor info, VAT amounts.

url.description: URL to invoice image or PDF

capabilities.name: Email Deliverability Check
capabilities.description: Check email deliverability for a domain: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, MX records, blacklist status. Returns 0-100 score.
